title: file upload in subitem forms
excerpt:
I love the fact that we can finally submit subitems in workforms. However, I need to be able to upload files as well. 
Adding file upload to workforms would be amazing!

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the fact that we can finally submit subitems in workforms. However, I need to be able to upload files as well.

Adding file upload to workforms would be amazing!
